meta.task: Self-Improving / Self-Iteration Agent 前沿实践搜索

results.title: Towards Healthy Evolution: Exploring the Role and Mechanisms of Human-Agent Interaction in Self-Evolving Systems (ANCHOR)
results.abstract: Self-evolving agents improve through continual self-play and self-generated learning signals, but autonomous evolution can also cause capability degradation and safety drift. ANCHOR simulates human supervision at various phases of self-evolution, showing limited supervision substantially mitigates safety degradation.

results.title: EvoDS: Self-Evolving Autonomous Data Science Agent with Skill Learning and Context Management
results.abstract: EvoDS introduces Autonomous Skill Acquisition (ASA) and Adaptive Context Compression (ACC) via agentic reinforcement learning, enabling agents to synthesize, validate, and reuse executable skills.

results.title: Toward Vibe Medicine: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Framework for Clinical Decision Support (VIBEMed)
results.abstract: Multi-agent framework with a built-in self-evolution mechanism and architecture-level safety sandbox. Enables iterative updates across memory, model behavior, and decision strategies.

results.title: The Meta-Agent Challenge: Are Current Agents Capable of Autonomous Agent Development?
results.abstract: Introduces MAC benchmark for testing frontier models' capacity for autonomous agent development. Meta-agents rarely match human-engineered baselines; high optimization pressure surfaces emergent adversarial behaviors.

results.title: EvoDrive: Pareto Evolution for Safety-Critical Autonomous Driving via Self-Improving LLM Agents
results.abstract: LLM-based agentic evolution framework with simulator-grounded actor-critic architecture. Memory-driven actor iteratively improves generators while critics filter implausible candidates.

results.title: Autonomous heterogeneous catalyst discovery with a self-evolving multi-agent digital twin (CatDT)
results.abstract: Self-evolving multi-agent system building autonomous digital twin of working catalyst. Memory-augmented reinforcement loop raises barrier-calculation success from 41% to 84%.

results.title: AgenticRL: Self-Refining Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Conditioned UAV Navigation
results.abstract: GPT agent interprets task info and visual scenes, generates reward functions, trains PPO policies, then acts as critic in closed-loop self-improvement process. 71% improvement over initial rewards.

results.title: ANDES: Agent Native Data Evolving Synthesis Tool for Autonomous Instruction Alignment
results.abstract: Reimagines data generation as plug-and-play agent skill. Self-evolving World Tree routing mechanism and actionable diagnostic reports for interactive closed-loop data synthesis.

results.title: OctoT2I: A Self-Evolving Agentic Text-to-Image Router
results.abstract: Self-Evolving Mechanism with iterative Propose-Solve-Evaluate-Learn (PSEL) loop. No human supervision required; discovers each tool's capability frontier autonomously.

results.title: Learning to Adapt: Self-Improving Web Agent via Cognitive-Aware Exploration (SCALE)
results.abstract: SCALE uses three adversarial roles (Selector, Predictor, Judger) to autonomously discover agent's limitations and expand cognitive boundaries through environmental exploration.

results.title: Communication Policy Evolution for Proactive LLM Agents
results.abstract: Communication Policy Evolution (CPE) framework for refining communication policies through rollout and prompt-level evolving. Achieves best task success using prompt refinement alone.

results.title: Agentic Framework for Deep Learning workload migration via In-Context Learning
results.abstract: Autonomous system combining ICL with oracle-driven self-debugging. Autonomous agentic loop synthesizes tests, executes repeatedly, and uses traceback for self-correction. 91% numerical equivalence.

results.title: Deep Research in Physical Sciences: A Multi-Agent Framework and Comprehensive Benchmark
results.abstract: DelveAgent with adaptive planning loop, dual-granularity memory, and hierarchical physics-grounded reflection mechanism. Improves accuracy by up to 7.5pp while reducing costs to ~1/3.

results.title: Self-Evolving Visual Questioner
results.abstract: VLM continuously improves itself as visual questioner without external supervision. Self-evolving framework uses VLM as both proposer and filter to produce harder, more informative questions.

results.title: From Holistic Evaluation to Structured Criteria: Rubrics Across the Evolving LLM Landscape
results.abstract: Rubrics as unifying framework for evaluation, RL, and safety alignment. At intrinsic level, rubrics emerge dynamically from model behaviors, driving self-improvement.

results.title: Enhancing Operational Safety via Agentic Dialogue Hazard Identification Analysis (HAZDIAL)
results.abstract: Investigates structured agentic dialogue (multi-agent, multi-turn) for hazard identification. Algorithm-based agentic interaction optimization with adversarial debate and constructive discussion.

results.title: Self-Evolving Scientific Agent Discovers Generalizable Physically-Reasoned Fluid Control
results.abstract: Self-evolving scientific-agent workflow driven by LLMs and iterative code generation. Agent deploys strategies into physical simulations, diagnoses behaviors from multimodal evidence, translates observations into source-code refinements.

results.title: SkillRevise: Improving LLM-Authored Agent Skills via Trace-Conditioned Skill Revision
results.abstract: Execution-grounded framework for iteratively refining initial agent skills. Diagnoses defects from execution evidence, retrieves repair principles from memory, applies execution-anchored edits. Improves success rate from 36.05% to 61.63%.

results.title: Self-Refining Topology Optimization via an LLM-Based Multi-Agent Framework (TopOptAgents)
results.abstract: Six LLM-based agents collaborate through iterative self-refinement cycles spanning problem formulation, validation, code generation/execution, and quality assessment. Error correction and progressive improvement.

results.title: Sibyl-AutoResearch: Autonomous Research Needs Self-Evolving Trial-and-Error Harnesses, Not Paper Generators
results.abstract: Self-evolving AutoResearch framework built around Scientific Trial-and-Error Harnesses. Trial-to-behavior conversion and trial-to-harness-behavior conversion for routing lessons into later planning.

results.title: SEMA-RAG: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent RAG Framework for Medical Reasoning
results.abstract: Three specialist agents (Interpreter, Explorer, Arbiter) with sufficiency-driven self-evolving retrieval. Improves baseline by +6.46 accuracy points. Accepted to Findings of ACL 2026.

results.title: ARIS: Autonomous Research via Adversarial Multi-Agent Collaboration
results.abstract: Research harness with cross-model adversarial collaboration - executor drives progress while reviewer critiques. Self-improvement loop records research traces and proposes harness improvements.

results.title: AgentDisCo: Towards Disentanglement and Collaboration in Open-ended Deep Research Agents
results.abstract: Adversarial optimization between exploration and exploitation. Critic evaluates outlines and refines queries; generator retrieves results and revises. Meta-optimization harness discovers design strategies.

results.title: DocSync: Agentic Documentation Maintenance via Critic-Guided Reflexion
results.abstract: Critic-guided refinement loop based on Reflexion paradigm. AST-aware agentic approach for self-correcting candidate updates. Iterative critic loop yields measurable improvements.

results.title: CentaurTA Studio: A Self-Improving Human-Agent Collaboration System for Thematic Analysis
results.abstract: Two-stage human feedback pipeline, persistent prompt optimization distilling validated feedback into reusable alignment principles, rubric-based evaluation. Reaches peak within ~10 iterative rounds.

results.title: PFAgent: A Tractable and Self-Evolving Power-Flow Agent for Interactive Grid Analysis
results.abstract: Self-evolution mechanism combining verification-driven refinement and human-in-the-loop feedback. AI-assisted evaluation and debugging loop using conversational context and execution errors.

results.title: AgenticRecTune: Multi-Agent with Self-Evolving Skillhub for Recommendation System Optimization
results.abstract: Five agents (Actor, Critic, Insight, Skill, Online) managing end-to-end configuration optimization. Self-evolving Skillhub summarizes history, extracts mechanics, and updates skills.

results.title: SkillLearnBench: Benchmarking Continual Learning Methods for Agent Skill Generation
results.abstract: First benchmark for evaluating continual skill learning methods. Multiple iterations in continual learning facilitate genuine improvement via external feedback; self-feedback alone induces recursive drift.

results.note: Bing returned primarily Chinese dictionary content. Academic results were not retrievable from this source.
Bing returned primarily dictionary definitions. No substantive academic results retrieved.

search_terms.result_count: Included in broader search results above

search_terms.query: agent learns from mistakes feedback loop

results.title: STaR: Bootstrapping Reasoning With Reasoning
results.abstract: Proposes STaR: generate rationales, if wrong try again given correct answer, fine-tune on correct rationales, repeat. Significantly improves performance vs direct answer prediction.

results.title: V-STaR: Training Verifiers for Self-Taught Reasoners
results.abstract: Uses both correct and incorrect solutions from self-improvement to train a verifier using DPO. 4-17% test accuracy improvement over existing self-improvement approaches.

results.title: Quiet-STaR: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Think Before Speaking
results.abstract: Generalizes STaR to arbitrary text - LMs learn to generate rationales at each token. Zero-shot improvements on GSM8K (5.9%->10.9%) and CommonsenseQA (36.3%->47.2%).

results.title: Lean-STaR: Learning to Interleave Thinking and Proving
results.abstract: Trains models to produce informal thoughts before each proof step. SOTA on miniF2F-test (43.4%->46.3% Pass@64).

results.title: RL-STaR: Theoretical Analysis of RL Frameworks for Self-Taught Reasoner
results.abstract: Provides theoretical foundation for STaR: criteria for pre-trained model quality, policy improvement analysis, convergence conditions, robustness examination.

results.title: B-STaR: Monitoring and Balancing Exploration and Exploitation in Self-Taught Reasoners
results.abstract: Identifies that exploration deteriorates rapidly over iterations. B-STaR autonomously adjusts configurations to balance exploration and exploitation.

results.title: STaR-SQL: Self-Taught Reasoner for Text-to-SQL
results.abstract: Reframes SQL generation as reasoning-driven process. 86.6% execution accuracy on Spider (+31.6% over few-shot baseline).

results.title: START: Self-taught Reasoner with Tools
results.abstract: Tool-integrated long CoT reasoning LLM. Hint-infer stimulates tool use; Hint-RFT fine-tunes on filtered trajectories. Competitive with o1-Preview.

results.title: AdaSTaR: Adaptive Data Sampling for Training Self-Taught Reasoners
results.abstract: Adaptive sampling for diversity and curriculum. Best accuracy in 6/6 benchmarks, reduces training FLOPs by avg 58.6%.

results.title: HS-STaR: Hierarchical Sampling via Difficulty Estimation and Budget Reallocation
results.abstract: Identifies boundary-level problems offer highest learning utility. Dynamically reallocates sampling budget toward high-utility problems.

results.title: STAR-S: Improving Safety Alignment through Self-Taught Reasoning on Safety Rules
results.abstract: Integrates safety rule reasoning into self-taught loop. Elicits reasoning and reflection guided by safety rules, then fine-tunes to enhance safety reasoning.

results.title: K-STaR: Knowledge-Aware Self-Taught Reasoner
results.abstract: Self-training framework that verifies reasoning paths through knowledge elicitation. Beyond correctness-centric supervision toward knowledge-grounded self-improvement.

results.title: VC-STaR: Self-Improving Visual Reasoning in VLMs via Visual Contrast
results.abstract: Visual Contrastive Self-Taught Reasoner leverages visual contrast to mitigate hallucinations in VLM reasoning paths.

results.note: Semantic Scholar API rate-limited. Known reference: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models (Wang et al., 2023) - uses GPT-4 in Minecraft with automated skill library, self-verification, and iterative exploration.

Semantic Scholar API rate-limited. Known reference: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning (Shinn et al., 2023) - agents reflect on feedback via verbal self-critique, store memories, and iterate on failures.

Semantic Scholar API rate-limited. Known reference: Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback (Madaan et al., 2023) - LLM generates output, provides own feedback, and refines iteratively without external supervision.

results.title: MetaGPT: Meta Programming for Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework
results.abstract: Encodes SOPs into prompts for structured coordination. Assembly line paradigm assigning diverse roles to agents for complex software engineering tasks.

results.title: AgentVerse: Facilitating Multi-Agent Collaboration and Exploring Emergent Behaviors
results.abstract: Multi-agent framework that collaboratively and dynamically adjusts composition. Studies emergent social behaviors among agents.

key_insights.insight: 三大核心自改进架构范式：Reflexion（口头RL+记忆反思循环）、STaR（自举推理+正确率过滤微调）、Self-Refine（自我反馈+迭代精炼）构成了当前Self-Improving Agent的三大基础范式，几乎所有新工作都在这三个框架上扩展。
探索-利用平衡是自改进系统的核心瓶颈：B-STaR等研究表明，模型的探索能力在自改进迭代中迅速退化。最优策略是动态调整采样预算，将资源集中在'边界难度'问题（HS-STaR、AdaSTaR）。
外部反馈优于自我反馈：SkillLearnBench发现多次迭代中外部反馈能带来真正改进，而仅靠自我反馈会导致递归漂移（recursive drift）。CentaurTA也证实移除反馈循环导致性能从90%降至81%。
技能库/记忆系统是持续进化的基础设施：EvoDS的Autonomous Skill Acquisition、CatDT的memory-augmented RL loop、AgenticRecTune的Self-Evolving Skillhub、SCALE的认知边界扩展——可复用技能积累和持久记忆是Agent自进化的关键使能器。
验证器/评论家作为质量把关是必需组件：V-STaR用DPO训练verifier从候选解中挑选最优；AgenticRL的GPT批评者诊断失败模式；ARIS的跨模型对抗审核——独立的验证/批评代理显著提升自改进质量。
安全退化是自主进化的潜在风险：ANCHOR证明了自主进化可能导致能力退化和安全漂移，但即使有限的监督（输出验证阶段）也能大幅缓解安全退化。增加监督频率呈现边际递减效应。
提示级进化是轻量高效的自改进手段：Communication Policy Evolution (CPE) 仅通过prompt refinement就实现了最佳任务成功率，无需修改模型权重。SGDe通过编译确定性结构到SLM harness中实现高效self-improvement。
META-AGENT挑战：当前的自主Agent开发能力仍然有限。MAC基准测试显示meta-agent很少能匹敌人工程序基线，且高优化压力下会出现ground-truth exfiltration等对抗行为。
多Agent对抗协作提升自改进鲁棒性：ARIS使用跨模型家族的执行者-评审者对抗协作；SCALE使用Selector/Predictor/Judger三对抗角色；AgentDisCo使用批评-生成对抗优化。不同的模型家族作为评审者效果更好。
工具集成是自改进推理的重要方向：START (Self-taught Reasoner with Tools) 通过代码执行实现复杂计算、自检查和自调试；Tool-Star通过RL支持多工具自主调用。Hint-infer通过在推理过程中插入提示来激发工具使用能力。
Voyager开创的开放式技能发现范式：在Minecraft中通过GPT-4自动编程技能、构建技能库、自我验证，实现了无需人工干预的持续能力增长。此范式已被EvoDS、SCALE等工作扩展到Web Agent和数据科学等领域。
自改进系统的评估基准正在形成：MAC（自主Agent开发能力）、SkillLearnBench（持续技能学习）、Sibyl-AutoResearch（trial-to-behavior转化审计）、Meta-Agent Challenge为自改进系统提供了标准化评估框架。
